data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for eligibility rules.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Eligibility rules (invoice status/amount thresholds)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for eligibility rules, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to invoice status or amount thresholds. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of validation for eligibility rules related to invoice status or amount thresholds.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify eligibility rules.
